votes.source_snippet: Ms. Teague made a motion to approve the agenda. The motion was seconded by Mr. Weidberg. The motion was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to support the "Smoke free NY" resolution
votes.source_snippet: He made a motion to support the "Smoke free NY". The motion was seconded by Mr. Bachorowski. A roll call was conducted. The vote was as follows: 21 "YES"; 7 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS"; 0 "RECUSALS". The motion was carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to support the SLA Review & DCA Committee recommendations
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Burrows made a motion to support the recommendations. The motion was seconded by Ms. Havan. The motion was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the agenda for the Board Meeting
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Needelman made a motion to approve the agenda. The motion was seconded by Ms. Bamonte and was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the minutes of the Combined Public Hearing and Board Meeting
votes.source_snippet: Ms. Teague made a motion to approve the minutes of the Combined Public Hearing and Board Meeting. The motion was seconded by Ms. Iglesias and was carried unanimously.

votes.motion_text: Motion to support the recommendation to approve the variance request for 338 Devoe Street (BSA Variance Request/Block 2924 Lot 12)
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Solano made the motion to support the recommendation to approve the variance request. The motion was seconded by Ms. McKeever. The motion was carried. The vote was as follows: 28 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS"; 0 "RECUSALS".

votes.motion_text: Motion to support the adoption of the twelve consensus points presented by GREC regarding the redevelopment of the Greenpoint Hospital site
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Torres made a motion to support the request made earlier about adopting the twelve consensus points presented by GREC regarding the redevelopment of the Greenpoint Hospital site. The motion was seconded by Ms. Havan. The motion was carried. The vote was as follows: 22 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS"; 6 "RECUSALS"

public_speakers.name: Ms. Dempsey
public_speakers.topic: Unenclosed Sidewalk Cafe - 258 Franklin LLC, dba Eagle Trading Co., 258 Franklin Street
public_speakers.source_snippet: There Ms. Dempsey, from Mr. Michael Kelly's office, represented the application. She noted the location was located on the corner of Franklin Street & Eagle Street.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Andrew Carabello
public_speakers.topic: Unenclosed Sidewalk Cafe - Double Deep LLC, dba Black Flamingo, 168 Borinquen Place
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Andrew Carabello, representing Mr. Shapiro (the owner) spoke on the application. They have been open since June 2015.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Sulin Carling
public_speakers.affiliation: Program Manager, NYC Department of City Planning
public_speakers.topic: North Brooklyn Industry & Innovation Plan
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Sulin Carling, Program Manager, NYC Department of City Planning presented on the item. She noted that that study is called "North Brooklyn Industry & Innovation Plan.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Burrows
public_speakers.topic: DCP - 25 Kent Avenue presentation
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Burrows asked about the presenter. Ms. Carling noted that she was conducting the presentation and not Mr. Sommers, who was listed on the agenda.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Odomirok
public_speakers.topic: DCP - 25 Kent Avenue presentation and Economic Development Committee notification
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Odomirok asked why the CB #1's Economic Development Committee was not notified?

public_speakers.name: Ms. Eisenberg
public_speakers.topic: North Brooklyn Industry & Innovation Plan
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Eisenberg commented that the study was a waste of time and money.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Needelman
public_speakers.topic: North Brooklyn Industry & Innovation Plan and Evergreen coordination
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Needelman asked if they were working with Evergreen. It was noted that they were and coordinating with the Brownfield Opportunity (BOA).

public_speakers.name: Mr. Ray Levin
public_speakers.affiliation: representative for the application for 25 Kent Avenue
public_speakers.topic: DCP - 25 Kent Avenue special permit application
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Ray Levin, representative for the application for 25 Kent Avenue, presented on the proposal. He noted that people are clamoring to open their businesses in the area.

public_speakers.name: P.A.A. Arlene Thomas
public_speakers.affiliation: Police Political Action Chairperson, Police Administrative Clerical Chapter, Local 1549/DC 37
public_speakers.topic: Civilianization in the Police Department/Hiring More Civilian Employees
public_speakers.source_snippet: A representative spoke for Ms. Thomas and noted that they have not progressed with the hiring of civilians. She noted that the budget for the next fiscal year was coming up and she urged the City and the Council to fund this portion of the budget

public_speakers.name: Amber Shedwell
public_speakers.affiliation: MBA/Vice President, Faculty Practice and Ambulatory Services, The Brooklyn Hospital Center
public_speakers.topic: Preventative Health Care Services Available To The Community Through The Brooklyn Hospital Center
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Shedwell spoke about the various services that Brooklyn Hospital provides for the community. She had recently presented to the Public Safety Committee.

public_speakers.name: Damaris Acosta
public_speakers.affiliation: Lobbying Bureau, City Clerk/Clerk of the Council's Office
public_speakers.topic: City Clerk - Amnesty Program
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Acosta presented on the Amnesty Program and distributed brochures. She noted that there was a six month amnesty period.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Eric Bruziatis
public_speakers.topic: Update On The Community Plan And GREC's Ongoing Dialogue With HPD
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Eric Bruziatis presented the update on GREC and the Greenpoint Hospital's redevelopment. He related that GREC had met with HPD to present community consensus points

public_speakers.name: Mr. Anthony Argento
public_speakers.topic: Rezoning and 25 Kent Avenue
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Anthony Argento, President, Broadway Stages, spoke to comment about the plans for Rezoning and 25 Kent Avenue.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Armando Chapelliquen
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal & text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Armando Chapelliquen, Association for Neighborhood & Housing Development, submitted written testimony regarding 25 Kent Avenue proposal & text amendment.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Richard Mazur
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Richard Mazur, North Brooklyn Development, spoke in favor of the 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment.

public_speakers.name: Mr. David Eisenman
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. David Eisenman, resident, spoke in favor of the 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Aron Kelly
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Aron Kelly, resident, spoke in favor of the 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Leah Archibald
public_speakers.topic: zoning text amendment and the 25 Kent Avenue proposal
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Leah Archibald, from Evergreen, spoke regarding the zoning text amendment and the 25 Kent Avenue proposal. Written testimony was submitted.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Williams Harvey
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Williams Harvey, resident, spoke in support of the 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Katherine Thompson
public_speakers.topic: zoning text amendment and the 25 Kent Avenue proposal
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Katherine Thompson, Friends of Bushwick Inlet Park, submitted written testimony regarding the zoning text amendment and the 25 Kent Avenue proposal.

public_speakers.name: Mr. Adam Friedman
public_speakers.topic: 25 Kent Avenue proposal and text amendment
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Adam Friedman, Director, Pratt Center, spoke and submitted written testimony.

public_speakers.name: Ms. Lucky Lee
public_speakers.topic: Enhanced Manufacturing Zone and IBZ
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Lucky Lee, Vice President/Sales, Lucky's Real Tomatoes, spoke regarding the Enhanced Manufacturing Zone and IBZ. She submitted written testimony.
